versions.version_description: This version is complete with chords and lyrics and includes the full chords for the bridge section.
Full lyrics with chords optimized for keyboard. For letter size printing, use -1 font size in UG print dialog.
Tried to write a chords version that has the proper arrangement noted, proper metadata, chord inversions, etc.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
The power of love is a curious thing[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Make a one man weep, make another man sing[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Change a hawk to a little white dove[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
More than a feeling, that's the power of love[/tab]

[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Tougher than diamonds, rich like cream[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Stronger and hotter than a bad girl's dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
Make a bad one good, mmm make a wrong one right[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Power of love will keep you home at night[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
You don't need money, don't take fame[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
Don't need no credit card to ride this train[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                    [ch]D[/ch]
It's strong and it's sudden and it's cruel sometimes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
But it might just save your life[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
That's the power of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
That's the power of love[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
First time you feel it, it might make you sad[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Next time you feel it, it might make you mad[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]
But you'll be glad, baby, when you've found[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
That's the power makes the world go 'round[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]
And it don't take money, don't take fame[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
Don't need no credit card to ride this train[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]                                [ch]D[/ch]
It's strong and it's sudden, it can be cruel sometimes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
But it might just save your life[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
They say that all in love is fair[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Yeah, but you don't care[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
But you know what to do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
When it gets hold of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
And with a little help from above[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
You feel the power of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
You feel the power of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Can you feel it?[/tab]

Hmm hmm

[Guitar Solo]
[ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]      x8

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
It don't take money, it don't take fame[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]
Don't need no credit card to ride this train[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Tougher than diamonds and stronger than steel[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
You won't feel nothin' 'til you feel[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
You feel the power, just feel the power of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                       [ch]A[/ch]
That's the power, that's the power of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
You feel the power of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
You feel the power of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Feel the power of love[/tab]
